prestazioni: Engine: 4.0L flat-six (9A2 Evo) with titanium connecting rods (Pankl Racing Systems) and forged Mahle pistons (13.5:1 compression), paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.4 bar boost) and a custom 42mm wastegate (Tial MV-R) for 950+ HP on E85 fuel

Drivetrain: 7-speed PDK transmission with a Sachs Performance twin-disc carbon clutch (300mm) and a Quaife ATB differential (85% lock), reinforced with a Guard Transmission skid plate and a custom titanium driveshaft (Pankl)

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping, spherical bearing top mounts (Tractive Suspension), and custom 28mm anti-roll bars (H&R) with adjustable end links (Whiteline), paired with a full carbon fiber subframe (935 Works)
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full 935-inspired carbon fiber widebody kit (935 Works) with a 2.2m rear wing (Porsche Motorsport GT3 R spec) and a custom front splitter with integrated dive planes (Rocket Bunny/Pandem hybrid design), featuring active Gurney flaps (Bosch Motorsport control unit)

Wheels: BBS FI-R 18x12 +25 front / 18x13 +30 rear (935-spec) with titanium wheel bolts (ARP) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/680R18 front, 325/705R18 rear), wrapped in custom gold anodized center caps (Porsche Classic)

Exterior: Full carbon fiber body panels (pre-preg autoclave, 1.5mm thickness) with a custom matte silver livery (Porsche Motorsport GT Silver) and exposed carbon weave accents, paired with a Lexan rear window (Polycarbonate Solutions) and a custom LED light bar (Hella Rallye 7000)
